name: Scorpio Wash
comment: Scorpio Wash, wash light fixture, based on 60 Watt RGBW LEDs, with independent control ability. Offers linear zoom function and kaleidoscopic/multibeam effects with the rotating lens plate. The extra front RGB ring, creates a nice visual effect, with a variety of macros, especially usefull when the fixture is used in a background setup.

capabilities.comment: Forward Speed from slow to fast
Backward Speed from slow to fast

gwSpecs.description: Scorpio Wash, wash light fixture, based on 60 Watt RGBW LEDs, with independent control ability. Offers linear zoom function and kaleidoscopic/multibeam effects with the rotating lens plate. The extra front RGB ring, creates a nice visual effect, with a variety of macros, especially usefull when the fixture is used in a background setup.
